_templateMeta.name: Counter-Based Quest
_templateMeta.description: A multi-stage quest that tracks progress using a counter. Shows how to sequence subquests.

_annotations.counters[0]: Tracks the current quest stage (0 = not started, 1 = stage 1 done, 2 = complete). Adjust the SID and use it in all Counter conditions below.
_annotations.quests[0]: The main quest container. Replace the SID and set localization tokens for name/description.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0]: Stage 1: defeat the first target. This subquest is active from the start.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0]: Fires when the stage-1 squad is defeated. Advances the counter to 1 and activates stage 2.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0].actio: CounterSet marks stage 1 done. The Counter condition on the stage-2 trigger uses this value.
Completes this subquest in the quest log.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[1]: Stage 2: the follow-up objective. Replace 'E_Squad_Target2' with the stage-2 squad's entity SID.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[1].triggers[0]: Fires when the stage-2 squad is defeated AND the stage counter is at 1 (i.e. stage 1 is done). The AND logic ensures correct ordering.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[1].triggers[0].actio: Sets counter to 2 — marks the full quest as done. Other quests can check this value.
